global_description: Gelatinous marine creature with a translucent, bell-shaped body, often in shades of blue or pink, trailing long, thin tentacles. The body is soft and flexible, allowing it to float and pulse through water.

part_details.bell: Translucent, dome-shaped, often blue or pink
part_details.tentacles: Long, thin, trailing from the bell

spatial_relations: Tentacles extend from the edge of the bell
Bell is the central part of the body
